failClosedHosts: Linux ROCm without hipcc/rocminfo/gfx GPU agent
GH200 without aarch64 Linux plus Hopper/compute-capability-9.x GPU

vulkanBuiltForkGraph.description: Native-Linux graph gate. Links against libggml-vulkan from the managed output or explicit ELIZA_DFLASH_VULKAN_BIN_DIR, rejects macOS/MoltenVK and software Vulkan by default, requires ggml_backend_supports_op for GGML_OP_ATTN_SCORE_QJL, GGML_OP_ATTN_SCORE_TBQ (turbo3, turbo4, turbo3_tcq), and GGML_OP_ATTN_SCORE_POLAR (use_qjl=0/1), then runs real graph execution and numeric reference comparison. Must pass before any Vulkan CAPABILITIES kernel bit flips runtime-ready.

linuxNativeVulkan.description: Rejects non-Linux/MoltenVK and software ICDs by default, writes hardware-results evidence, runs standalone Vulkan fixtures, builds linux-x64-vulkan, dumps CAPABILITIES diagnostics, then runs the built-fork graph gate against the managed output directory. Build failure or symbol-only staging exits non-zero.

androidVulkan.description: Cross-compiles vulkan_verify with the Android NDK, pushes verifier/SPIR-V/fixtures through adb, records physical-device evidence, and runs on Adreno/Mali hardware. Standalone fixture success exits non-zero unless ELIZA_ANDROID_VULKAN_GRAPH_EVIDENCE proves Android Vulkan graph dispatch for all six graph routes or all five runtime capability keys.

fusedAttn.description: Fused attention forward (QJL-K score -> online softmax -> quantized-V mix, score vector never materialized). C reference: eliza_fused_attn_qjl_tbq3 (bit-exact to the fork's GGML_OP_FUSED_ATTN_QJL_TBQ CPU op) and eliza_fused_attn_qjl_polar in packages/inference/verify/qjl_polar_ref.{h,c}. This is an optimization on top of the existing five score/softmax/V-mix kernels (AGENTS.md §3) — a backend that cannot dispatch the fused op routes through the standalone path, it does not silently degrade. NOT in requiredRuntimeCapabilityKeys / manifestKernelNames yet: only Vulkan has verified a fused graph dispatch, so the capability is not part of the build-script required-kernel gate. Promote it (and add a manifest kernel name) only once the target backend reports a runtime-ready fused smoke.

selfTest.note: gen_fixture --self-test recomputes fused == score->softmax->V-decode->mix independently (tol 1e-3) and round-trips the TBQ V-cache blocks.

fusedAttn.nextGate: Vulkan fused dispatch is verified on real Intel ANV (GGML_OP_FUSED_ATTN_QJL_TBQ graph route, vulkan-dispatch-smoke 7/7, max diff 4.5e-8; standalone fused 1920/1920 PASS). Metal standalone fused-attn + polar_preht are hardware-verified on Apple M4 Max via metal-verify-fused, but Metal still needs a built-fork graph-dispatch smoke before fusedAttn.runtimeStatus.metal can flip runtime-ready. CUDA still needs cuda-verify-fused on an NVIDIA host (cuda_verify already parses fused_attn_qjl_tbq.json; cuda/fused-attn-qjl-tbq.cu authored). fused_attn stays out of requiredRuntimeCapabilityKeys / manifestKernelNames — it is an optimization on top of the five required kernels (AGENTS.md §3), not a required kernel — until all backends report a runtime-ready fused smoke and the manifest schema adds a fused kernel name.

linux-x64-cpu.nextGate: Run native CPU backend smoke for QJL/Polar SIMD paths and DFlash lifecycle.

linux-x64-rocm.nextGate: Run ELIZA_DFLASH_SMOKE_MODEL=/models/eliza-1-smoke.gguf ./rocm_runner.sh on an AMD ROCm host.

linux-x64-vulkan.nextGate: Run native Intel/AMD/NVIDIA built-fork graph smoke, not only standalone SPIR-V or MoltenVK.

linux-aarch64-cpu.nextGate: Run on an arm64 Linux host and collect CPU backend parity.

linux-aarch64-cuda.nextGate: Run ELIZA_DFLASH_SMOKE_MODEL=/models/eliza-1-smoke.gguf ./gh200_runner.sh on a GH200/H100/H200 aarch64 CUDA host.

android-arm64-cpu.nextGate: Run CPU/NEON parity on a physical Android device.

android-arm64-vulkan.nextGate: Cross-compile vulkan_verify and run all fixtures on Adreno and Mali devices.

darwin-arm64-metal.nextGate: Run fused Metal smoke against a full Eliza-1 bundle after graph-dispatch smoke.

ios-arm64-metal.nextGate: Run physical-device XCTest/Capacitor smoke against the embedded metallib and GGML_OP_ATTN_SCORE_TBQ Turbo4 route.

ios-arm64-simulator-metal.nextGate: Run simulator smoke against the embedded metallib and GGML_OP_ATTN_SCORE_TBQ Turbo4 route.

windows-x64-cpu.nextGate: Run native Windows CPU binary and AVX2 QJL/Polar smoke.

windows-x64-cuda.nextGate: Run pwsh -File packages/inference/verify/windows_runner.ps1 -Backend cuda -Model C:\models\eliza-1-smoke.gguf on NVIDIA hardware.

windows-x64-vulkan.nextGate: Run pwsh -File packages/inference/verify/windows_runner.ps1 -Backend vulkan -Model C:\models\eliza-1-smoke.gguf on native Windows Vulkan.

windows-arm64-cpu.nextGate: Run Snapdragon X native CPU smoke.

windows-arm64-vulkan.nextGate: Run Snapdragon X native Vulkan smoke.

linux-x64-cpu-fused.nextGate: Run fused libelizainference CPU smoke with voice off/on regions.

linux-x64-cuda-fused.nextGate: Run CUDA hardware runner first, then fused CUDA voice/runtime smoke on the same host.

linux-x64-vulkan-fused.nextGate: Run fused Vulkan smoke after the non-fused Vulkan graph smoke passes on native hardware.

darwin-arm64-metal-fused.nextGate: Run fused Metal smoke after full kernel dispatch lands.

windows-x64-cuda-fused.nextGate: Run Windows CUDA hardware runner first, then fused Windows CUDA voice/runtime smoke.
